disclaimer: Government portals are stable but feature sets and login flows change. Always check the portal directly. UAE Pass is required for almost all government e-services.

portals.name: UAE Pass
portals.what_it_does: National digital identity for all UAE residents and visitors. Used to log into 6,000+ government services, sign documents digitally, and access UAE Pass-integrated private apps.
portals.registration: Free. Download the UAE Pass app, scan Emirates ID, take selfie. Verify in person at a kiosk or via UAE Pass agent for full verification level.
key_features: Digital signing of government and private documents
portals.founder_relevance: Required for almost every government service. Register on day one. Verify to the highest level immediately.

portals.name: Basher
portals.what_it_does: UAE-wide unified business setup portal. Promises 15-minute company registration. Integrates with multiple emirates and free zones.
portals.developer_api_notes: No public developer API. Web portal only.
portals.founder_relevance: Useful for fast mainland setup in some emirates, but Dubai mainland is better served by Invest in Dubai.

portals.name: Invest in Dubai
portals.what_it_does: One-stop business setup portal for Dubai Mainland. Trade name search, activity lookup, license issuance, payment.
portals.founder_relevance: The recommended path for any Dubai mainland setup. Trade name reservation is instant.

portals.name: DET eServices
portals.what_it_does: Legacy parallel DET portal. Some services not yet on Invest in Dubai still live here.
portals.founder_relevance: Use Invest in Dubai by default. Fall back to this for specific legacy services.

portals.name: EmaraTax
portals.what_it_does: VAT and Corporate Tax registration, return filing, payments, refunds.
portals.founder_relevance: Mandatory for any VAT-registered or CT-registered business. Use UAE Pass to log in.

portals.name: MOHRE eServices
portals.operator: Ministry of Human Resources and Emiratisation
portals.what_it_does: Work permits, labour disputes, employment contracts, WPS (Wages Protection System), Tas'heel work permit processing.
portals.founder_relevance: Required for any UAE-registered employer. WPS is mandatory for all salaried employees.
key_services: Sahel mobile app for workers (Note: Sahel here is UAE app, NOT Kuwait)

portals.name: GDRFA Smart Services (Dubai)
portals.operator: General Directorate of Residency and Foreigners Affairs (Dubai)
portals.what_it_does: Visas, residency, entry permits, smart gate, passport renewal, family sponsorship.
portals.founder_relevance: Use this for Dubai-issued residency. ICP Smart Services is the federal alternative for other emirates.

portals.name: ICP Smart Services
portals.operator: Federal Authority for Identity, Citizenship, Customs and Port Security
portals.what_it_does: UAE-wide ID, citizenship, visa, residency services. Federal portal.
portals.founder_relevance: Used for federal Golden Visa applications, Emirates ID, and non-Dubai residencies.

portals.name: u.ae
portals.what_it_does: Federal government information hub. Service catalogue, federal news, sector-specific guides. Link-out to actual service portals.
portals.founder_relevance: Best starting point for any UAE-wide service question. Authoritative source for visa rules and federal labour law.

portals.name: Dubai Now
portals.what_it_does: Mobile app aggregating 130+ Dubai government services. DEWA bills, RTA fines, Salik recharge, visa renewal, court cases.
portals.founder_relevance: Useful day-to-day app for residents. Not a B2B integration target.

portals.name: Dubai REST (DLD)
portals.what_it_does: Real estate transactions, broker info, Ejari status check, RERA-approved sales agreements.
portals.developer_api_notes: DLD operates a separate paid API Gateway (~AED 31,500/yr per product). Dubai REST app is consumer-only.

portals.name: Dubai Developer Portal (iPaaS)
portals.what_it_does: Dubai government developer marketplace. Catalogue of APIs from various Dubai entities.
portals.developer_api_notes: Catalog loads via JavaScript so the contents could not be enumerated programmatically. Existence confirmed, contents unverified.
portals.founder_relevance: Worth checking for entity-specific APIs not listed elsewhere.

portals.name: UAE Federal API Marketplace
portals.developer_api_notes: Existence confirmed but catalog loads dynamically. Hosts MOHAP drug registry and other federal APIs.

disambiguation.name: Sahel app
disambiguation.issue: Sahel is a Kuwait government app. The UAE has no production app called 'Sahel' as of April 2026. Do not invent a UAE Sahel.

disambiguation.name: SmartPass
disambiguation.issue: SmartPass is the legacy federal predecessor to UAE Pass. It is no longer the active federal authentication product. Steer all developers and founders to UAE Pass instead.
